hero.bio: I build fast, clean and user-focused web experiences. Passionate about quality interfaces and the details that make the difference.

about.subtitle: Get to know me
about.title: About
about.p1: I'm a Frontend Developer based in Valencia with professional experience building websites for marketplaces. I'm passionate about creating fast, clean interfaces focused on the user.
about.p2: I mainly work with React and Next.js, with experience in Angular as well. On the styling side I use Tailwind CSS and Bootstrap, and Vite as my build tool of choice on modern projects.
about.p3: I hold a Higher Degree in Web Application Development and a Master's in 3D Art from my time in the video game industry. That background gave me a creative eye for design and user experience that I bring directly into every interface I build.
